title: Backup-File vs MCP: Long-Term Path Analysis
summary: Decides not to build a competing MCP server; integrate sirkirby/unifi-mcp as opt-in runtime companion while backup-file remains the primary posture engine.
scope: auth tradeoffs (X-API-KEY vs local admin cookie)
notes: Manifest declared ADR with precedence 1; treated as authoritative. Document is structured as analysis-leading-to-decision with explicit Recommendation, What NOT to build, and Concrete next steps sections. Locks D-006 per orchestrator context (integrate sirkirby/unifi-mcp instead of building our own).
